matn_ar_clean: ن أقبل، فإذا ثوب أدبر فإذا سكت أقبل، فلا يزال بالمرء يقول له اذكر ما لم يكن يذكر حتى لا يدري كم صلى ". قال أبو سلمة بن عبد الرحمن إذا فعل أحدكم ذلك فليسجد سجدتين وهو قاعد. وسمعه أبو سلمة من أبي هريرة ـ رضى الله عنه.
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Huraira:Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) said, "When the Adhan for the prayer is pronounced, then Satan takes to his heels passing wind so that he may not hear the Adhan and when the Mu'adh-dhin finishes, he comes back; and when the Iqama is pronounced he again takes to his heels and when it is finished, he again comes back and continues reminding the praying person of things that he used not to remember when not in prayer till he forgets how much he has prayed." Abu Salama bin `Abdur-Rahman said, "If anyone of you has such a thing (forgetting the number of rak`at he has prayed) he should perform two prostrations of Sahu (i.e. forgetfulness) while sitting." Abu Salama narrates this from Abu Huraira
iwh_en: Abu Huraira (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that Allah's Messenger ﷺ said, "When the Adhan for the prayer is pronounced, then Satan takes to his heels passing wind so that he may not hear the Adhan and when the Mu'adh-dhin finishes, he comes back; and when the Iqama is pronounced he again takes to his heels and when it is finished, he again comes back and continues reminding the praying person of things that he used not to remember when not in prayer till he forgets how much he has prayed." Abu Salama bin `Abdur-Rahman said, "If anyone of you has such a thing (forgetting the number of rak`at he has prayed) he should perform two prostrations of Sahu (i.e. forgetfulness) while sitting." Abu Salama narrates this from Abu Huraira
iwh_id: Dari Abu Huraira (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, “Ketika Adzan salat dikumandangkan, maka Setan mengambil langkahnya melewati angin agar dia tidak mendengar Adzan dan ketika Mu'adz-dhin selesai, dia kembali; dan ketika Iqamah diucapkan dia kembali mengambil langkahnya dan ketika selesai, dia kembali lagi dan terus mengingatkan orang yang salat tentang hal-hal yang dulu dia tidak ingat ketika tidak dalam salat sampai dia lupa. seberapa banyak dia berdoa." Abu Salama bin `Abdur-Rahman berkata, “Barangsiapa di antara kalian yang mengalami hal seperti itu (lupa jumlah rakaat yang telah ia salat) hendaknya ia melakukan dua sujud Sahu (yaitu lupa) sambil duduk.” Abu Salama meriwayatkan ini dari Abu Huraira

ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى، حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عُمَرَ، قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي ابْنُ أَبِي ذِئْبٍ، عَنْ سَعِيدٍ الْمَقْبُرِيِّ، قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ يَقُولُ النَّاسُ أَكْثَرَ أَبُو هُرَيْرَةَ، فَلَقِيتُ رَجُلاً فَقُلْتُ بِمَ قَرَأَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم الْبَارِحَةَ فِي الْعَتَمَةِ فَقَالَ لاَ أَدْرِي‏.‏ فَقُلْتُ لَمْ تَشْهَدْهَا قَالَ بَلَى‏.‏ قُلْتُ لَكِنْ أَنَا أَدْرِي، قَرَأَ سُورَةَ كَذَا وَكَذَا‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى، حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عُمَرَ، قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي ابْنُ أَبِي ذِئْبٍ، عَنْ سَعِيدٍ الْمَقْبُرِيِّ، قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ يَقُولُ النَّاسُ أَكْثَرَ أَبُو هُرَيْرَةَ، فَلَقِيتُ رَجُلاً فَقُلْتُ بِمَ قَرَأَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم الْبَارِحَةَ فِي الْعَتَمَةِ فَقَالَ لاَ أَدْرِي. فَقُلْتُ لَمْ تَشْهَدْهَا قَالَ بَلَى. قُلْتُ لَكِنْ أَنَا أَدْرِي، قَرَأَ سُورَةَ كَذَا وَكَذَا.
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْمُثَنَّى، حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عُمَرَ، قَالَ أَخْبَرَنِي ابْنُ أَبِي ذِئْبٍ، عَنْ سَعِيدٍ الْمَقْبُرِيِّ، قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ يَقُولُ النَّاسُ أَكْثَرَ أَبُو هُرَيْرَةَ، فَلَقِيتُ رَجُ
matn_ar: لاً فَقُلْتُ بِمَ قَرَأَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم الْبَارِحَةَ فِي الْعَتَمَةِ فَقَالَ لاَ أَدْرِي. فَقُلْتُ لَمْ تَشْهَدْهَا قَالَ بَلَى. قُلْتُ لَكِنْ أَنَا أَدْرِي، قَرَأَ سُورَةَ كَذَا وَكَذَا.
matn_ar_clean: لا فقلت بم قرأ رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم البارحة في العتمة فقال لا أدري. فقلت لم تشهدها قال بلى. قلت لكن أنا أدري، قرأ سورة كذا وكذا.
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Huraira:People say that I narrate too many narrations of the Prophet; once I met a man (during the lifetime of the Prophet) and asked him, "Which Sura did Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) recite yesterday in the `Isha' prayer?" He said, "I do not know." I said, "Did you not attend the prayer?" He said, "Yes, (I did)." I said, "I know. He recited such and such Sura
iwh_en: Abu Huraira (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that people say that I narrate too many narrations of the Prophet ﷺ; once I met a man (during the lifetime of the Prophet ﷺ) and asked him, "Which Sura did Allah's Messenger ﷺ recite yesterday in the `Isha' prayer?" He said, "I do not know." I said, "Did you not attend the prayer?" He said, "Yes, (I did)." I said, "I know. He recited such and such Sura
iwh_id: Abu Huraira (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa orang-orang mengatakan bahwa saya terlalu banyak meriwayatkan riwayat Nabi SAW_SYMBOL; Suatu ketika aku berjumpa dengan seorang laki-laki (semasa hidup Nabi ﷺ dan bertanya kepadanya, “Surah manakah yang dibacakan Rasulullah ﷺ kemarin saat salat Isya?” Dia berkata, “Aku tidak tahu.” Aku berkata, “Apakah kamu tidak menghadiri salat?” Dia menjawab, “Ya, (aku melakukannya).” Aku berkata, “Aku tahu.
